transcript:
CEO: Welcome everyone. Three announcements.
CEO: First, we closed the Series B. Eighty million.
CEO: Second, we're opening a London office in September.
CEO: Third, we're rolling out a new performance review process — HR will share details.
HR: Yes, I'll send the new review framework email tomorrow.
Engineer: Will the London office include engineering roles?
CEO: Yes, primarily engineering and product.
